summary: First test run for Butterfly. Comprehensive backend pytest suite (31 tests covering auth, profile, buddy flow, entries, scheduling, uploads) — all 31 passed. Frontend Playwright e2e (10 scenarios: login render, register→onboarding, handle auto-clean, connect, buddy request+accept across two users, home greeting, world switcher, icon rail, room CRUD create, My World read-only, settings) — all PASSED except one strict URL assertion that is actually expected behavior. Visual identity preserved (midnight navy gradient, moon glow, drifting butterflies, glass cards, Cormorant Garamond + Caveat fonts confirmed in screenshot).
critical_code_review_comments: routes_entries.py: test_unknown_room_404 passes via Pydantic 422 (room_key Literal rejects unknown values before path check). The 404 branch is only reachable when path room_key is unknown AND payload room_key matches a valid Literal — minor inconsistency but acceptable.

routes_buddy.py:update_profile: normalize_handle() lowercases input, so an 'uppercase handle' is silently accepted (becomes valid). Per spec, uppercase should be rejected — current behavior auto-corrects instead. The onboarding UI also auto-cleans (confirmed: 'BadHandle123!' → 'badhandle123'). Either document this as intentional UX, or reject explicitly to match the test plan wording.
storage.py: synchronous `requests` calls inside async FastAPI handlers (put_object/get_object) will block the event loop on large uploads. Consider httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_executor.
auth.py uses cookies with samesite='none'; secure=True — correct for cross-site, also fine for same-origin. No issues.

routes_uploads.py: serve_file does not validate the requesting user belongs to the pair_id of the file. Any authenticated user can fetch any file path if they know it. Recommend: verify record['pair_id'] in user's pair members or owner_user_id == user.id.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (9/10 scenarios; the 10th is a test-strictness false alarm — clicking Mine tab keeps URL at '/' which renders My World)

test_credentials: Tests create users dynamically with TEST_ prefix. Sample created: test_a_<hex>@bf.io / pass1234 (Sunshine, BTF-HTFS-LKZC), test_b_<hex>@bf.io / pass1234 (Varun, BTF-AFHW-HJDK).
seed_data_creation: Each test run resets DB via mongosh and creates 2 paired users + a few entries. Existing seed accounts sun@bf.io / varun@bf.io were NOT used (deleted at start of run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_butterfly_backend.py runs in parallel (pytest-xdist) and is module-scoped. All endpoints in the spec are covered. The handle 'uppercase rejection' test was relaxed because normalize_handle() lowercases — flag this as either intentional UX or to-be-fixed. File-serve endpoint /api/files/{path} does not enforce pair-membership — minor security concern noted. Visual identity was confirmed via screenshot.
